reasoning: XLK -1.01% down (tech breaking premarket) + XLE +2.42% up (energy rallying on commodity rotation) while XLF flat = classic risk-off. Tech weakness is a major drag on SPY (tech ~30% weighting). Energy outperforming SPY significantly indicates narrow defensive rotation, not broad upside. Bearish bias with medium-high confidence — sector internals align on downside pressure into RTH.
key_observations: XLK: -1.01% — significant tech selling premarket, major headwind for SPY
XLE: +2.42% — energy rallying hard on defensive/commodity rotation, NOT bullish for growth stocks
XLF: +0.02% — financials flat, no support for broader market rally
Rotation: Risk-off. Energy strength + tech weakness is textbook defensive positioning.
Breadth: Narrow. Only energy is bidding. Tech weakness suggests downside continuation into RTH.
